skills.name: site-summary
skills.description: LLM-optimised summary of ZQUAS: what it is, who it serves, the engine's published benchmark numbers, and the regulatory frameworks it covers.

skills.name: site-summary-full
skills.description: Long-form companion to llms.txt with the verbatim content of the strongest pages on the site (homepage, technology, regulators, founder timeline).

skills.name: facts
skills.description: Machine-readable fact sheet: benchmark numbers, federation protocols, regulatory engagement, founder profile, competitor positioning, locked thresholds.

skills.name: glossary
skills.description: Definitions for the cryptographic, regulatory, and architectural terms used across ZQUAS: AMLR Article 75, MPC, ECDH-PSI, Garbled Circuits, GPU-native, cryptographic proof bundle, deterministic evaluation, and more.

skills.name: position-paper-article-75
skills.description: Position paper on AMLR Article 75: how Multi-Party Computation enables full customer base federation for AML detection without sharing personal data. Legal argument, evidence, and a path to a pilot.

skills.name: position-paper-edge-to-federation
skills.description: Position paper on a unified architecture for real-time financial crime detection across institutional, cross-bank, and regulatory layers.

skills.name: position-paper-beyond-banking
skills.description: Position paper on cross-sector federated detection across banks, telecommunications operators, and digital asset platforms.

skills.name: one-pager
skills.description: Single-page PDF summary of the engine, benchmarks, and regulatory traction. Suitable for buyer hand-out.

skills.name: articles-feed
skills.description: RSS 2.0 feed of all ZQUAS analysis articles, sorted newest-first. Updated whenever a new article is published.
